author: Pasquale
name: Recurrent 0011 + g2 R768
blurb: Non-record 16MB track submission using a stripped recurrent SP-1024 candidate with a fixed block_anchor 0011 + g2 schedule (R768, H12/KV6, shared corrective core) on 1xH100 for 600s; final int8+zlib roundtrip scored 1.35568780 BPB under the 16,000,000-byte cap.
